title: Add provided Bengali story to Stories section and update contact email address

requirements.text: Replace the placeholder content in the Stories (গল্প) section with the provided story, using the exact Bengali title “আশ্রয়হীন” and the full provided Bengali story body text.

quotes: গল্পের যেই বিভাগ আছে সেখানে এই গল্পটি দিন। গল্পের শিরোনাম - আশ্রয়হীন।
Yes, make changes and add the story properly that I will gave you the previous day.

acceptanceCriteria: When navigating to the Stories/গল্প section, the article title displays exactly as “আশ্রয়হীন”.
The story body text is rendered in full and matches the user-provided Bengali text (no omissions or edits).
The story is formatted for readability (e.g., paragraph breaks preserved; no collapsed single-block text).
The existing Stories section comments component remains present and functional.

requirements.text: Update the Contact section’s displayed email address and mailto link to use the new email: shovangoswami6@gmail.com.
acceptanceCriteria: The Contact section shows “shovangoswami6@gmail.com” as the email text.
Clicking the email opens a mailto link targeting “shovangoswami6@gmail.com”.
No remaining UI text in the Contact section references the old email address.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Keep backend architecture as a single Motoko actor; do not introduce additional canisters/services.
Use English for any new user-facing UI text added as part of these changes (story text remains Bengali as provided).
nonGoals: Do not implement a new content management/upload system.
Do not change comment storage behavior or contact form submission behavior beyond updating the displayed email address.
Do not change SEO metadata unless explicitly required for the email update.
